docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY OSORIO, ROBERT J. MD. AS TO DEFENDANT SALANSANG,LILIAN IDBA BAY AREA PHYSICIANS SERVICES BELTRAN,ROMULO IDBA BAY AREA PHYSICIAN'S SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSORIO, ROBERT J. MD. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALANSANG,LILIAN IDBA BAY AREA PHYSICIANS SERVICES BELTRAN,ROMULO IDBA BAY AREA PHYSICIAN'S SERVICES $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,055.00, NO SERVICE ON DEFT. BELTRAN, ROMULO IND/DBA BAY ARE PHYSICIAN'S SERVICES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SALANSANG,LILIAN IDBA BAY AREA PHYSICIANS SERVICES BELTRAN,ROMULO IDBA BAY AREA PHYSICIAN'S SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT OSORIO, ROBERT J. MD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
